message:
feat(lifecycle): add operational telemetry counters to PaneLifecycleEngine [ft-3kxe.17]

Add PaneLifecycleTelemetry with 8 counters (health_checks,
panes_registered, panes_removed, actions_none/warn/review/graceful_kill/
force_kill) wired into health_check() and remove_pane(). Plain u64 since
methods take &mut self.

Includes proptest_pane_lifecycle_telemetry.rs with 10 unit tests and 5
property tests covering call counting, unique pane registration,
monotonicity, action count invariant, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
